OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 60273186) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUNGLE COMMUNICATIONS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JAMES BRYANT, JBR PARTNERS, INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT AS TO ALL FIVE CAUSES OF ACTION ALLEGED IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY JUNGLE COMMUNICATIONS IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONVERSION AND OVERRULED AS TO ALL OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION IS AN IMPERMISSIBLE ATTEMPT TO CONVERT A BREACH OF CONTRACT/FRAUD CLAIM FOR MONEY INTO A CONVERSION CLAIM. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT ALLEGE NOR IS IT REASONABLY POSSIBLE FOR IT TO ALLEGE THAT DEFENDANTS CONVERTED SPECIFICALLY IDENTIFIABLE DOLLARS. ALL OTHER CLAIMS ARE ADEQUATELY ALLEGED. MUCH OF THE DEMURRER IS BASED ON A MISREADING OF THE LBE ORDINANCE. THAT ORDINANCE PERMITS AN LBE SUBCONTRACTOR SUCH AS PLAINTIFF TO SUE FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT DAMAGES WITHOUT A LIMITATION ON THOSE DAMAGES. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Thomas J. O'Brien, of Bradshaw & Associates, P.C., Tel. 415.433.4800, for plaintiffs;
James A. Bryant, II, of The Cochran Firm, Tel. 323.435.8205, for defendants.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. DEFENDANT JAMES BRYANT, JBR PARTNERS, INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT as to all five causes of action alleged in the first amended complaint filed by Jungle Communications is sustained without leave to amend as to the third cause of action for conversion and overruled as to all other causes of action. The third cause of action is an impermissible attempt to convert a breach of contract/fraud claim for money into a conversion claim. Plaintiff does not allege nor is it reasonably possible for it to allege that defendants converted specifically identifiable dollars. All other claims are adequately alleged. Much of the demurrer is based on a misreading of the LBE Ordinance. That Ordinance permits an LBE subcontractor such as plaintiff to sue for breach of contract damages without a limitation on those damages. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

DEFENDANTS JAMES BRYANT AND JBR PARTNERS, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar at the request of the moving party.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported. (D302)
